codeReview.summary: The feature stays within the parser-only test surface and adds reusable synthetic fixtures plus targeted regressions that cover the pending-graph contract prerequisites: empty payloads, delimiter-only fallback behavior, leading/trailing/consecutive delimiters, per-section accounting, object-to-section mapping, and repeated-parse stability.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, shared-state docs, and commit a927594. The change is scoped to crates/h7cad-native-dwg/tests/read_headers.rs, matches the feature description and expected behavior, and provides the fixture foundation later pending-graph features rely on without introducing runtime or service changes.
